hindi: जय जय श्री राधा रानी। वृंदावन की महारानी॥
english: Victory to Shri Radha Rani; queen of Vrindavan
roman: Jai Jai Shri Radha Rani, Vrindavan Ki Maharani

hindi: जय वृषभानु दुलारी राधा। भक्तन की तुम हरो आधी॥
english: Victory to Radha, darling of Vrishabhanu; remove half the troubles of devotees
roman: Jai Vrishbhanu Dulari Radha, Bhaktan Ki Tum Haro Aadhi

hindi: कृष्ण प्रिया राधे गोरी। बरसाने की छोरी॥
english: Radha, beloved of Krishna, fair one; daughter of Barsana
roman: Krishna Priya Radhe Gori, Barsane Ki Chhori

hindi: राधे राधे जपत सब। पाते हैं सुख अब॥
english: All chant Radhe Radhe; and attain happiness now
roman: Radhe Radhe Japat Sab, Paate Hain Sukh Ab

hindi: राधाष्टमी को पूजन करे। राधा कृपा फल सहज भरे॥
english: Whoever worships on Radhaashtami; is easily filled with the fruits of Radha's grace
roman: Radhashtami Ko Poojan Kare, Radha Kripa Phal Sahaj Bhare

hindi: राधा चालीसा जो गाए। कृष्ण प्रेम और भक्ति पाए॥
english: Whoever sings the Radha Chalisa; attains Krishna's love and devotion
roman: Radha Chalisa Jo Gaaye, Krishna Prem Aur Bhakti Paaye

hindi: राधा चालीसा जो गाए। कृष्ण प्रेम और भक्ति पाए॥
english: Whoever sings the Radha Chalisa; attains Krishna's love and devotion
roman: Radha Chalisa Jo Gaaye, Krishna Prem Aur Bhakti Paaye

hindi: जय जय राधा कृष्ण युगल। प्रेम रस में हैं मगन सकल॥
english: Victory to the divine pair Radha-Krishna; all are immersed in the nectar of their love
roman: Jai Jai Radha Krishna Yugal, Prem Ras Mein Hain Magan Sakal
